targets.boundary: Operations and data centers electricity use
targets.notes: By FY25 and annually thereafter achieve and maintain 100% renewable electricity for operations and data centers with renewable energy from sources that create additionality when available and commercially reasonable, aiming to reduce Scope 1 and 2 emissions in line with a 1.5 degrees Celsius global temperature rise.
targets.title: Scope 1 and 2 100% renewable electricity by FY25

targets.notes: By FY26 engage manufacturing suppliers comprising at least 67% of Scope 3 category 1 Purchased Goods and Services emissions with the goal of supplier adoption of science-based targets aligned with limiting temperature rise to 1.5 degrees Celsius.
targets.title: Scope 3 supplier engagement on SBTs by FY26
